24 Travon Williams

24 Travon Williams

  • Class:
    Sophomore
  • Hometown:
    Schertz, Texas
  • Major:
    Psychology
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career
  • Historical

Summary

Biography

AT ST. EDWARD'S

2025-26 (Sophomore) 
Played in three games, totaling 11 minutes ... earned 5 rebounds, two assists, one block, and 6 points on the season. 

2024-25 (Freshman) 
Scored 30 points and grabbed 13 rebounds with five steals and three blocks in 115 minutes played over 20 games. Scored a career-high eight points on Dec. 5 against Sul Ross St., grabbed five rebounds on Feb. 6 against DBU. 

HIGH SCHOOL: First Team All-District and Defensive Player of the Year ... Played AAU for Next Level Raiders. 

PERSONAL: Parents are Christopher Williams and Sabrina Williams ... Siblings are Halo and Jackson.
No stats available for the current season.
